documentationFeedback: No documentation files changed. CLI flags are self-documenting via legion start --help. AGENTS.md still references env vars for controller config — updating to mention CLI flags would be a nice follow-up.
observations: --port flag parsed at config layer but allocatePort() in startDaemon() overwrites it (pre-existing behavior, not introduced by PR)
packages/envoy-plugin/src/index.ts still reads process.env.ENVOY_URL directly — outside daemon package scope
